title: Yosys segfaults if you run `verilog_defaults` command without doing anything else
body:
```
$ yosys

 /----------------------------------------------------------------------------\
 |                                                                            |

 |  OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE USE OR PERFORMANCE OF THIS SOFTWARE.            |
 |                                                                            |
 \----------------------------------------------------------------------------/

 Yosys 0.7+381 (git sha1 8f2638ae, gcc 6.3.0-18 -fPIC -Os)

yosys> verilog_defaults 
Segmentation fault
```
